is_p_falciparum.evidence: Clinical trial for treatment of uncomplicated Plasmodium falciparum malaria.

reports_target_markers.evidence: The paper only performed PCR genotyping at msp1, msp2, and glurp to distinguish recrudescence from reinfection, and species-identification PCR. No drug-resistance codon markers (Pfcrt, Pfk13, Pfdhfr, Pfdhps, Pfmdr1, Pfcytb) were assessed.

reports_extractable_frequencies.evidence: No molecular resistance marker frequencies reported; only clinical cure/reinfection rates.

sub_country_location.evidence: Study site is Phuoc Chien Commune, Ninh Hai District, Ninh Thuan Province, Vietnam — sub-national resolution.

temporal_resolution_within_3y.evidence: Study conducted between September 2006 and December 2007 (within 3 years).

african_field_samples.evidence: Samples collected in central Vietnam, not an African country.

duplicate_risk.evidence: Single field trial under the Vietnam Australia Defence Malaria Project; no evidence of pooled multi-site resistance dataset.

supplement.evidence: No supplementary molecular data referenced; the study does not report target resistance markers.

assessment.summary: Randomized clinical trial comparing DHP and AAQ for uncomplicated P. falciparum malaria in central Vietnam (2006-2007). It reports clinical efficacy/cure rates but no drug-resistance codon markers, and was conducted in Vietnam, not an African country.
exclusion_reasons: No target drug-resistance markers reported (only msp1/msp2/glurp genotyping for recrudescence vs reinfection)
No extractable per-locus resistance marker frequencies
Samples collected in Vietnam, not an African country
